recommendations.title: It's a Disaster
recommendations.overview: Four couples meet for Sunday brunch only to discover they are stuck in a house together as the world may be about to end.

recommendations.title: Housefull 4
recommendations.overview: Three couples who get separated from each other due to an evil ploy, reincarnate after 600 years and meet each other as history repeats itself again and their respective partners get mixed up this time.

recommendations.title: The Stoning of Soraya M.
recommendations.overview: In 1986 Iran, Sahebjam, whose car breaks down in a remote village, enters into a conversation with Zahra, who relays to him the story about her niece, Soraya, whose arranged marriage to an abusive tyrant ended in tragedy.

recommendations.title: Foxfire
recommendations.overview: The story of five teenage girls who form an unlikely bond after beating up a teacher who has sexually harassed them. They build a solid friendship but their wild ways begin to get out of control.

recommendations.title: Absence of Malice
recommendations.overview: Megan Carter is a reporter duped into running an untrue story on Michael Gallagher, a suspected racketeer. He has an alibi for the time his crime was allegedly committed—but it involves an innocent party. When he tells Carter the truth and the newspa

recommendations.title: Norman: The Moderate Rise and Tragic Fall of a New York Fixer
recommendations.overview: A financial schemer finds himself in the middle of an international scandal after he becomes a political adviser to the new Prime Minister of Israel.

recommendations.title: St. Vincent
recommendations.overview: A young boy whose parents just divorced finds an unlikely friend and mentor in the misanthropic, bawdy, hedonistic, war veteran who lives next door.

recommendations.title: Little Women
recommendations.overview: Four sisters come of age in America in the aftermath of the Civil War.

recommendations.title: The Perfect Guy
recommendations.overview: With a fulfilling career and a loving relationship, lobbyist Leah Vaughn seems to have it all. Things come crashing down when Dave, her long-term boyfriend, disagrees with her future plans for marriage and a family. The resulting painful breakup leav

recommendations.title: Anesthesia
recommendations.overview: Multiple lives intersect in the aftermath of the violent mugging of a Columbia University philosophy professor.
